search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20014` $advanced_filter$ | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `sampling(bytes_in)` | `sampling(bytes_out)` | `sampling(flow_count)` | eval bytes=bytes_in+bytes_out | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(bytes_in) as sumbytes_in sum(bytes_out) as sumbytes_out sum(bytes) as sumbytes sum(flow_count) as sumflowcount by exp_ip dest_ip dest_port transport _time nfo_hostname | eval avgbits_in= sumbytes_in*8/($span_int$) | eval avgbits_out= sumbytes_out*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes_in) as TrafficAmountIn sum(sumbytes_out) as TrafficAmountOut sparkline(sum(sumbytes)) as Trend sum(sumflowcount) as Connections max(avgbits_in) as MaxTrafficIn max(avgbits_out) as MaxTrafficOut by exp_ip dest_ip dest_port transport nfo_hostname | sort 0 - Connections | head 100 | eval AverageSpeedIn=(TrafficAmountIn)*8/$range$ | eval AverageSpeedOut=(TrafficAmountOut)*8/$range$ | eval TrafficSpeedIn=AverageSpeedIn/1000000 | eval TrafficAmountIn=TrafficAmountIn/1024/1024 | eval MaxTrafficIn=MaxTrafficIn/1000000 | eval TrafficSpeedOut=AverageSpeedOut/1000000 | eval TrafficAmountOut=TrafficAmountOut/1024/1024 | eval MaxTrafficOut=MaxTrafficOut/1000000 | `format_ip_column(dest_ip_string, dest_ip, dest_host)` | `format_port_column(dest_port_string, dest_port)` | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps received, TrafficSpeedIn, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB received, TrafficAmountIn, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps sent, TrafficSpeedOut, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB sent, TrafficAmountOut, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps received, MaxTrafficIn, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps sent, MaxTrafficOut, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Connections, Connections)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | table exp_ip_name dest_ip_string dest_port_string "Total Connections" Trend "Max Mbps received" "Average Mbps received" "Total Traffic MB received" "Max Mbps sent" "Average Mbps sent" "Total Traffic MB sent" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename dest_ip_string as "Service IP" | rename dest_port_string as "Service Port"

`netflow_search_rule_20014` $advanced_filter$ | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `sampling(bytes_in)` | `sampling(bytes_out)` | `sampling(flow_count)` | eval bytes = bytes_in + bytes_out | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(bytes_in) as sumbytes_in sum(bytes_out) as sumbytes_out sum(bytes) as sumbytes sum(flow_count) as sumflowcount by exp_ip src_ip _time nfo_hostname | eval avgbits_in= sumbytes_in*8/($span_int$) | eval avgbits_out= sumbytes_out*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes_in) as TrafficAmountIn sum(sumbytes_out) as TrafficAmountOut sparkline(sum(sumbytes)) as Trend sum(sumflowcount) as Connections max(avgbits_in) as MaxTrafficIn max(avgbits_out) as MaxTrafficOut by exp_ip src_ip nfo_hostname | sort 0 - Connections | head 100 | eval AverageSpeedIn=(TrafficAmountIn)*8/$range$ | eval AverageSpeedOut=(TrafficAmountOut)*8/$range$ | eval TrafficSpeedIn=AverageSpeedIn/1000000 | eval TrafficAmountIn=TrafficAmountIn/1024/1024 | eval MaxTrafficIn=MaxTrafficIn/1000000 | eval TrafficSpeedOut=AverageSpeedOut/1000000 | eval TrafficAmountOut=TrafficAmountOut/1024/1024 | eval MaxTrafficOut=MaxTrafficOut/1000000 | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps received, TrafficSpeedIn, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB received, TrafficAmountIn, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps sent, TrafficSpeedOut, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB sent, TrafficAmountOut, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps received, MaxTrafficIn, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps sent, MaxTrafficOut, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Connections, Connections)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `format_ip_column(src_ip_string, src_ip, src_host)` | table exp_ip_name src_ip_string "Total Connections" Trend "Max Mbps received" "Average Mbps received" "Total Traffic MB received" "Max Mbps sent" "Average Mbps sent" "Total Traffic MB sent" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename src_ip_string as "Peer IP"

chart.title: Top 10 peers with most unauthorized connections for service $submitted:Service IP$

search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20014` $advanced_filter$ | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") (dest_ip="$Service IP$" OR dest_host="$Service IP$") dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `sampling(bytes_in)` | `sampling(bytes_out)` | eval bytes = bytes_in + bytes_out | eventstats latest(src_host) as l_src_host by exp_ip src_ip | `format_ip_column(src_ip_string, src_ip, l_src_host)` | `per_second_chart(sum(bytes) by src_ip_string,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

chart.title: Top 10 services with most unauthorized connections from $submitted:Peer IP$

search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20014` $advanced_filter$ | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" (src_ip="$Peer IP$" OR src_host="$Peer IP$") (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `sampling(bytes_in)` | `sampling(bytes_out)` | eval bytes = bytes_in + bytes_out | eventstats latest(dest_host) as l_dest_host by exp_ip dest_ip | `format_ip_column(dest_ip_string, dest_ip, l_dest_host)` | `per_second_chart(sum(bytes) by dest_ip_string,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10014: Asset Access Monitor” (syslogs with nfc_id=20014). This Module monitors traffic to selected services characterized by an IP address, destination port number and an IP protocol (services) and matches communications to a list of authorized peers. The list of authorized peers may include IP address ranges or IP addresses of individual hosts. For each of the services the Module reports communications with the hosts outside of the authorized peers list. This Module is packaged in NFO “Services Monitor” Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
